calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Crawford for petitioner Sharon Poward-Dowdell

In response to an inquiry form the Court, Mr. Crawford confirmed that no objection was made to the petition for final distribution. He stated that the distribution was as provided by the parties' settlement agreement, and that all parties had submitted consent to the settlement. The Court granted the petition (order signed).

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robin Crawford for Sharon Poward-Dowdell (Executor).

Mr. Crawford stated that they have reviewed the accounting, that they found some discrepancies and that they sent it back to the Accountant. Status on close of estate is continued to December 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that if the accounting is not filed, he will need to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Pay Retainer Of Special Litigation Counsel To Pursue Unlawful Detainer Action On Behalf Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Crawford for (administrator) Sharon Poward-Dowdell.

The Court stated that the procedural issues have been cleared, that it has seen no objections and confirmed that counsel was not aware of any objections. The Court granted the petition for authority to pay retainer of special litigation counsel to pursue unlawful detainer action on behalf of the estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
